contactInfo.address: Flashbay Inc. 569 Clyde Avenue, Unit 500, Mountain View, CA 94043

reviews.text: Matt was great! Once I submitted our order, he immediately called to check in and make sure that our product was exactly what we were looking for. Upon arrival, he called the same day to confirm receipt. Top notch! Will definitely be ordering from FlashBay again!
reviews.title: Awesome Customer Service!

reviews.text: Clear and fast communication - even when I asked for multiple different proofs to make sure I was getting the exact product we needed. Matt was also great at helping me confirm the image was high-quality before it was sent to production, which was so helpful. I've had experiences with other companies in the past where that has not been the case and gotten the items with a low quality logo printed on them.
reviews.title: Clear and fast communication

reviews.text: Matt was super kind and was very quick to respond to any questions I had.  He sent samples and they arrived quickly and were great quality. reviews.text: I always find what I need, the descriptions are great . I really wish you would still offer USPS shipping to the US Virgin Islands like you used to. The pice yo ulist for DHL sounds still reasonable Ish, but the isse is that after I get the item delivered, DHL send me an additional invoice for $35 per order, so the shipping eds up costing over double what is expected. And there is always delays and issues with DHL actually delivering all the way home. Often you don't even know the item arrived onto the island and you don't find out until you call them and ask about it. And then you have ot pay their recommended person to clear it and they often are busy and it takes sometimes an extra week to get the item. When you ask if you can go an clear it yourself they try to get you to pay their preferred agent instead. It used to be much better when items arrived USPS, there was no nonsense back then. So please bring back USPS shipping to the VI!
reviews.title: I always find what I need but shipping was better before
